title: Important Update: CBDT Issues Corrigenda for ITR Forms 1-7 and Form U for AY 2026-27
content:
# Important Update: CBDT Issues Corrigenda for ITR Forms 1-7 and Form U for AY 2026-27

Ek important update hai for all taxpayers and professionals! The Central Board of Direct Taxes (CBDT) ne Assessment Year (AY) 2026-27 ke Income-tax Return (ITR) Forms 1 to 7 aur Form U ke liye corrigenda (corrections) announce kiye hain. Yeh notifications, bearing numbers 57/2026 to 63/2026, all dated April 10, 2026, aim to streamline and rectify certain provisions, schedules, and reporting formats.

**Why this update?**
The main objective behind these corrigenda is to enhance clarity, ensure consistency, and facilitate accurate reporting by taxpayers. Basically, forms ko aur user-friendly aur error-free banane ki koshish hai.

**Key Highlights of the Corrigenda:**

*   **ITR-1 & ITR-4:** ITR-1 mein, Schedule-IT ko revise kiya gaya hai for detailed advance tax and self-assessment tax payments. ITR-4 mein, Part B (Gross Total Income) mein structural corrections kiye gaye hain.
*   **ITR-2:** Isme Schedule CG, OS, CFL, aur Part B-TI mein multiple corrections kiye gaye hain, jaise references ko theek karna aur grey shading remove karna.
*   **ITR-3:** Schedule CG aur OS mein corrections hue hain, expressions ko standardize kiya gaya hai aur row references ko theek kiya gaya hai.
*   **ITR-5:** Schedule CG aur UD mein errors rectify kiye gaye hain, jisme computation formulas aur cross-references ko adjust kiya gaya hai.
*   **ITR-6:** Yahaan par kafi comprehensive corrections hain, including typographical errors, structural updates across various schedules, aur pass-through income/loss ke liye naya sub-row add kiya gaya hai.
*   **ITR-7:** Schedule I, CG, OS, CYLA, aur Part B-TI mein technical amendments hue hain, jaise cells ko interchange karna aur pass-through income/loss ke liye naya row add karna.
*   **Form U:** Part A (General Information) mein ek formatting issue correct kiya gaya hai to ensure "Wrong heads of income chosen" is presented clearly.

These changes are mostly technical and clarificatory in nature, designed to make the filing process smoother for everyone.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://www.incometax.gov.in/iec/foportal/latest-updates)

*Published on: 11 April 2026*
